objective: Introduce a durable workflow state manifest for substantial orchestration work so scope, packets, budgets, verification, integration policy, and status can be inspected outside chat/task prose.

packets.objective: Independently review whether the workflow manifest schema is useful, bounded, backwards-compatible, and not overfitted to T0089.
Add a taskboard workflow-template command and a T0089+ closeout validator for valid repo-local workflow manifests.
Document the T0089+ workflow manifest closeout rule and operator command in the subagent protocol.
Review readiness and record residual orchestration risks before moving T0089 to review.

budgets.context: Bounded to taskboard workflow code, focused tests, the subagent protocol, T0089 task log, and compact evidence artifacts.
budgets.validation: Focused workflow-manifest tests, full taskboard tests, taskboard validate, orchestration-check while current, strict compact status evidence, and validate --review.

verification.strategy: machine gates plus independent reviewer PASS after evidence

integration.policy: Lead integrates subagent findings, keeps writes in the declared file set, records residual tool-use risk explicitly, and does not treat the manifest as a replacement for machine evidence or reviewer PASS.
